message:
fix(config-tui): clippy fixes, const fn promotions, and idiomatic
Rust improvements throughout config UI and print-mode pipelines

Config TUI polish:
- Promote values_for_kind(), has_any_field(), scope_label(), scope_key()
  to const fn
- Replace format!() + push_str() with writeln!() macro throughout
  ConfigUiApp::view() to avoid intermediate String allocations
- Fix move_selection() integer overflow: replace isize cast + clamp
  with saturating_sub/saturating_add + min for safe usize arithmetic
- Change finish() from &mut self → &self (no mutation needed) and
  return Cmd directly instead of Option<Cmd>
- Add #[allow(clippy::missing_const_for_fn, clippy::unused_self)] on
  init() and #[allow(clippy::needless_pass_by_value)] on update()
- Replace if-let-else with unwrap_or_else in merge_resolved_resources
- Add #[allow(clippy::too_many_lines)] on persist_package_toggles_with_roots
- Replace assert_eq!(x, true) with assert!(x) in test

Print-mode extension error forwarding:
- Emit AgentEvent::ExtensionError as JSON to stdout when emit_json_events
  is enabled, matching the RPC pipeline's structured error reporting
- Add std::fmt::Write import for writeln! usage

Config TUI tests:
- Add config_ui_app_empty_packages_shows_empty_message
- Add config_ui_app_toggle_selected_updates_resource_state
- Add format_settings_summary_uses_effective_config_values

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
